steps.t: Dági has asked you to go to the next set of collection buckets and stop the Orc. The buckets are in an area that overlooks the Mirrormere, to the sout…
The Orc has not touched these buckets yet, but is most likely nearby. You should feign ignorance about the Orc's presence and pretend to collect snow.
This specific Orc will trouble Dági no longer. He waits for you at Ashmargathâl.
